== Notes for [[Item:Q88635|Q88635]] ==

SOURCE NOTES:
http://www.american-pictures.com/genealogy/persons/per00630.htm#0

RESEARCH NOTES:
King of Lydia 645-624 BCE

KING OF LYDIA ca. 657 BC

He ruled from 679 to 630 b.c.

He ruled from 679 to 630 b.c.

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
